case_title: SN2, LLC VS. MR. SCOTT SMITH, VIANT GROUP LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PARTIES HAVE UNTIL JANUARY 18, 2008 TO SUBMIT BRIEFING ON REQUEST FOR ARBITRATION. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2008 - CONTINUED TO APR-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION DENIED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SN2, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MR. SCOTT SMITH, VIANT GROUP LLC $541.06 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $571.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT, STATING THAT SMALL CLAIMS HAS NO JURISDICTION OVER THE CASE.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MR. SCOTT SMITH, VIANT GROUP LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2008 - CONTINUED TO MAY-22-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVING A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE - CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: EDWARD HOLTZ. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
